productDisplayName: Provogue Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these semi-formal slip-ons with a pointed toe design from provogue adds that extra bounce to your step. Perfect for those who love to slip in and out of their footwear with ease, this pair offers comfort and style with its perforated pattern. Team it with jeans, chinos or even formal trousers for that classy look.UpperCrinkled leather upper for added durability and stylePointed toe design for a more stylish lookStitch detailing in definite pattern on the forefoot regionSlip-on design for easy removal and wearing of shoesLightly padded collar for in-step comfort and a snug FitZipper on the medial side for added ease of comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortLeather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry OutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
